summary.key_theme: 市場高度看好 Constellation Energy 受惠於 AI 資料中心帶動的電力需求成長，儘管面臨財報前夕的波動與目標價微調。

bullish.title: AI Data Center Power Deals and Nuclear Expansion Could Be A Game Changer For Constellation Energy (CEG)
bullish.reason: 強調核能擴張與 AI 資料中心電力合約的長期成長潛力，並提及穩定的股利政策，具備強勁基本面支撐。

bullish.title: Is Constellation Energy (CEG) the Best Power Generation Stock To Buy For Data Center Demand?
bullish.reason: 將 CEG 列為資料中心電力需求下的首選標的，反映市場對其在能源轉型中關鍵地位的認可。

bullish.title: Why Constellation Energy (CEG) Is Expanding Nuclear Capacity for AI Demand
bullish.reason: 分析公司擴大核能產能以應對 AI 需求，顯示其具備滿足高耗能產業的技術與資源優勢。

bullish.title: Calpine Acquisition Strengthens Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) as a High-Growth Utility Stock
bullish.reason: 透過併購 Calpine 強化資產組合，被分析師視為高成長公用事業股的關鍵驅動力。

bullish.title: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Constellation Energy Stock?
bullish.reason: 儘管過去一年表現落後大盤，但華爾街分析師對其未來展望仍保持高度樂觀。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy's Q1 Earnings Ahead: Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock?
bullish.reason: 市場預期 Q1 財報將受惠於資料中心需求與長期購電合約，為股價提供正面預期。

bearish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Constellation Energy, Lowers Price Target to $381
bearish.reason: 雖然維持買進評級，但下調目標價可能引發市場對短期成長動能放緩的擔憂。

bearish.title: Why Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Dipped More Than Broader Market Today
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 3.28%，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期賣壓與獲利了結情緒。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
bearish.reason: 指出公司缺乏財報超預期的關鍵要素，對短期獲利表現持保留態度。

bearish.title: Recent Filing Shows That Sen. Shelley M Capito Sold Over $3K Worth of Constellation Energy Stock
bearish.reason: 議員小額賣股對股價實質影響有限，但可能引發散戶對內部人動向的負面聯想。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Constellation Energy (CEG) After Recent Share Price Surge?
neutral.reason: 探討股價大漲後是否仍具價值，屬於中立的投資觀點分析，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: Here's How Much Traders Expect Constellation Energy Stock to Move After Earnings
neutral.reason: 僅描述財報發布前後的市場波動預期，屬於客觀的市場數據觀察。

neutral.title: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Constellation Energy Stock?
neutral.reason: 與 Yahoo 同名新聞重複，作為備選觀察，內容中立且無新資訊。
